features.title: Audio Driver Init
features.description: Initialize kernel audio subsystem during boot.

features.title: PS/2 Mouse Input
features.description: Initialize kernel PS/2 mouse input subsystem.

features.title: TTY2 Desktop
features.description: Enable desktop compositor tick/update path on TTY2.

features.title: Driver Manager
features.description: Initialize kernel ELF driver manager.

features.title: KELF Executor
features.description: Enable kernel ELF app dispatcher and kelfd task.

features.title: Auto Enter User Shell
features.description: Auto-exec /shell/shell.elf after kernel boot.

features.title: Heap Selftest
features.description: Run kmalloc/kfree selftest during kernel boot.

features.title: Load External PSF Font
features.description: Load /system/tty.psf and apply it to framebuffer TTY.

features.title: PS/2 Keyboard Input
features.description: Initialize PS/2 keyboard input subsystem.

features.title: ELFRUNNER Probe
features.description: Probe kernel ELF runtime metadata after ELFRUNNER init.

features.title: Scheduler Task: klogd
features.description: Enable periodic klogd maintenance task.

features.title: Scheduler Task: kworker
features.description: Enable periodic kernel worker service-heartbeat task.

features.title: Scheduler Task: usrd
features.description: Enable user/runtime dispatch task (shell tick, tty tick, exec tick).

features.title: Boot Video Geometry Logs
features.description: Print framebuffer width/height/pitch/bpp logs at boot.

features.title: PMM Stats Logs
features.description: Print PMM managed/free/used/dropped pages at boot.

features.title: Heap Stats Logs
features.description: Print heap total/free bytes at boot.

features.title: FS Root Children Log
features.description: Print root directory children count during FS init.

features.title: FS /SYSTEM Sanity Check
features.description: Require /system directory check during boot.

features.title: ELFRUNNER Init
features.description: Initialize ELFRUNNER framework in kernel boot path.

features.title: SYSCALL Tick Query
features.description: Query timer ticks via syscall and log result during boot.

features.title: TTY Ready Logs
features.description: Print TTY count/active/cursor ready logs.

features.title: Idle Loop Debug Log
features.description: Print debug log before entering kernel idle loop.
